texto: Any man will usually get from other men just what he is expecting of them. If he is looking for friendship he will likely receive it. If his attitude is that of indifference it will beget indifference. And if a man is looking for a fight he will in all likelihood be accommodated in that.
explicacao: Citação de John Richelsen sobre temas ligados a amizade. “Any man will usually get from other men just what he is expecting of them. If he is looking for f…” articula amizade, positive, reflexao em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
